user.title: Set up a Merged Calendar
user.description: Create a new calendar entity that combines events from multiple source calendars.

data_description.name: The name for the new merged calendar entity.
data_description.entity_id: Select two or more calendar entities to merge.
data_description.default_calendar: Optional. New events created from this merged calendar will be saved here. Must be one of the source calendars above.

error.no_sources: Please select at least one source calendar.
error.default_not_in_sources: The default calendar must be one of the selected source calendars.

abort.already_configured: A merged calendar with this name already exists.

data_description.name: The name for the merged calendar entity.
data_description.entity_id: Select two or more calendar entities to merge.
data_description.default_calendar: Optional. New events created from this merged calendar will be saved here. Must be one of the source calendars above.

error.no_sources: Please select at least one source calendar.
error.default_not_in_sources: The default calendar must be one of the selected source calendars.
